nasb.text: Now then, listen to their voice; however, you shall solemnly warn them and tell them of the procedure of the king who will reign over them.”

esv.text: Now then, obey their voice; only you shall solemnly warn them and show them the ways of the king who shall reign over them.”

cnv.text: 現在你只管聽從他們的話，但必須鄭重警告他們，告訴他們那要統治他們的王要怎樣治理他們。”

ccb.text: 你就照他们所求的去做吧！但你要警告他们，让他们知道将来王会怎样管辖他们。”
